title: The Hanover Insurance Group, Inc. Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.95 Per Common Share
author: Prnewswire
description: The Hanover Insurance Group, Inc. (NYSE: THG) announced that its board of directors has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.95 per share, payable on June 26, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 12, 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company declared a quarterly dividend of $0.95 per share, demonstrating financial strength and commitment to returning capital to shareholders. Regular dividend payments are typically viewed positively as they indicate stable earnings and management confidence in future performance.

title: 3 Insurance Stocks for High Total Returns
author: Bob Ciura
description: The article highlights three insurance stocks with strong dividend growth potential: Aflac, Principal Financial Group, and The Hanover Insurance Group. These companies demonstrate solid financial performance, consistent earnings growth, and attractive dividend histories.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Strong Q3 2025 results with 60.7% revenue surge, 43 consecutive years of dividend increases, expected 2025 earnings of $7.45 per share, and consistent earnings-per-share growth of 8.5-9.9% over past years
Increased assets under management to $784 billion, 13% year-over-year earnings-per-share growth, solid 6-7% average annual earnings-per-share growth, and successful asset management business
Significant Q3 2025 net income improvement from $102.1 million to $178.7 million, strong pricing momentum, profitable growth across business segments, and disciplined cost management

title: The Hanover Insurance Group, Inc. Increases Quarterly Dividend to $0.90 Per Common Share
author: Prnewswire
description: The Hanover Insurance Group, Inc. has announced a 20% increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.90 per share, demonstrating the company's financial stability and growth potential.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company has increased its quarterly dividend for the 20th consecutive year, indicating its strong financial performance and confidence in its future prospects.

title: Why Hanover Insurance Group is a Top Dividend Stock for Your Portfolio
author: Zacks
description: Hanover Insurance Group (THG) is a top dividend stock for income investors due to its consistent dividend growth, attractive dividend yield, and strong earnings outlook.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights Hanover Insurance Group as a top dividend stock for investors due to its consistent dividend growth, attractive dividend yield of 2.31% compared to the industry and S&P 500 averages, and strong earnings growth outlook with a 595.51% year-over-year increase in 2024 earnings per share.
